attempts.agent_commands:
for iteration in range(3):
    bls_it = BoxLeastSquares(t_it, f_it, dy=e_it)
    res_it = bls_it.autopower(duration=[0.03, 0.05, 0.08, 0.1, 0.15],
                              minimum_period=1.0,
                              maximum_period=13.0,
                              frequency_factor=3.0)
    
    pow_it = np.array(res_it.power)
    per_it = np.array(res_it.period)
    best_it = np.argmax(pow_it)
    bp = float(per_it[best_it])
    bt0 = float(res_it.transit_time[best_it])
    bdur = float(res_it.duration[best_it])
    
    sde_it = (pow_it - np.mean(pow_it)) / np.std(pow_it)
    print(f\"Iter {iteration}: best P={bp:.4f}, SDE={sde_it[best_it]:.1f}, dur={bdur:.4f}\")
    
    # Mask transits of this period
    phase = ((t_it - bt0) % bp) / bp
    in_transit = (phase < bdur/bp/2) | (phase > 1 - bdur/bp/2)
    
    # Re-detrend with transits masked
    flux_masked = f_it.copy()
    flux_masked[in_transit] = np.nan
    
    # Remove this signal: divide by transit model
    transit_model = bls_it.model(t_it, bp, bdur, bt0)
    f_it = f_it / transit_model.y
    
    print(f\"  Masked {in_transit.sum()} transit points, re-running BLS\")

/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/find_period_final.py << 'PYEOF'
import numpy as np
from astropy.timeseries import BoxLeastSquares
from astropy.stats import sigma_clip
from scipy.optimize import curve_fit
from wotan import flatten

# ── 1. Load and filter ──
data = np.loadtxt('/root/data/tess_lc.txt')
time, flux, flag, flux_err = data[:,0], data[:,1], data[:,2], data[:,3]
good = (flag == 0) & np.isfinite(flux) & np.isfinite(time)
time, flux, flux_err = time[good], flux[good], flux_err[good]
clipped = sigma_clip(flux, sigma=5, maxiters=3)
mask = ~clipped.mask
time, flux, flux_err = time[mask], flux[mask], flux_err[mask]
print(f\"Data: {len(time)} points\")

# ── 2. Remove stellar rotation with Fourier series (10 harmonics) ──
def fourier_model(t, *params):
    f = params[0]
    offset = params[1]
    n_harmonics = (len(params) - 2) // 2
    result = np.full_like(t, offset)
    for n in range(n_harmonics):
        a = params[2 + 2*n]
        b = params[3 + 2*n]
        result += a * np.cos(2*np.pi*(n+1)*f*t) + b * np.sin(2*np.pi*(n+1)*f*t)
    return result

n_harm = 10
p0 = [1.0/1.4, 1.0] + [0.001, 0.001] * n_harm
popt, pcov = curve_fit(fourier_model, time, flux, p0=p0, maxfev=50000)
rotation_model = fourier_model(time, *popt)
detrended = flux / rotation_model

# ── 3. Secondary biweight detrend to remove residual trends ──
flat, trend = flatten(time, detrended, window_length=1.0, method='biweight', return_trend=True)
valid = np.isfinite(flat)
t_clean, f_clean, e_clean = time[valid], flat[valid], flux_err[valid]

# ── 4. Fine BLS search around 5.357 days ──
bls = BoxLeastSquares(t_clean, f_clean, dy=e_clean)

# Fine grid around 5.35 days
fine_periods = np.linspace(5.0, 5.7, 200000)
fine_result = bls.power(fine_periods, duration=[0.03, 0.05, 0.08, 0.1, 0.12, 0.15])

power = np.array(fine_result.power)
periods = np.array(fine_result.period)
best_idx = np.argmax(power)
best_period = float(periods[best_idx])
best_duration = float(fine_result.duration[best_idx])
best_t0 = float(fine_result.transit_time[best_idx])

sde = (power - np.mean(power)) / np.std(power)
print(f\"\\nFine BLS around 5.35d:\")
print(f\"  Best period: {best_period:.5f} d\")
print(f\"  Duration: {best_duration:.4f} d\")
print(f\"  T0: {best_t0:.4f}\")
print(f\"  SDE: {sde[best_idx]:.1f}\")

# ── 5. Even finer refinement ──
ultra_fine = np.linspace(best_period - 0.02, best_period + 0.02, 200000)
uf_result = bls.power(ultra_fine, duration=best_duration)
uf_power = np.array(uf_result.power)
uf_periods = np.array(uf_result.period)
uf_best = np.argmax(uf_power)
final_period = float(uf_periods[uf_best])
final_t0 = float(uf_result.transit_time[uf_best])

print(f\"\\nUltra-fine refinement:\")
print(f\"  Final period: {final_period:.6f} d\")

# ── 6. Verify by phase-folding ──
phase = ((t_clean - final_t0) % final_period) / final_period
phase[phase > 0.5] -= 1.0

# Bin the phase-folded curve
nbins = 200
bin_edges = np.linspace(-0.5, 0.5, nbins+1)
bin_centers = 0.5*(bin_edges[:-1] + bin_edges[1:])
bin_flux = []
for i in range(nbins):
    m = (phase >= bin_edges[i]) & (phase < bin_edges[i+1])
    if m.sum() > 0:
        bin_flux.append(np.median(f_clean[m]))
    else:
        bin_flux.append(np.nan)
bin_flux = np.array(bin_flux)

transit_depth = 1.0 - np.nanmin(bin_flux)
print(f\"  Transit depth: {transit_depth*100:.3f}%\")
print(f\"  Phase of minimum: {bin_centers[np.nanargmin(bin_flux)]:.3f}\")

# ── 7. Write result ──
with open('/root/period.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write(f\"{final_period:.5f}\\n\")

print(f\"\\nWritten period = {final_period:.5f} to /root/period.txt\")
PYEOF
python3 /root/find_period_final.py"
pkill -f find_period_final 2>/dev/null; echo "done"
/bin/bash -lc "cat > /root/solve.py << 'PYEOF'
import numpy as np
from astropy.timeseries import BoxLeastSquares
from astropy.stats import sigma_clip
from scipy.optimize import curve_fit
from wotan import flatten

# ── 1. Load and filter ──
data = np.loadtxt('/root/data/tess_lc.txt')
time, flux, flag, flux_err = data[:,0], data[:,1], data[:,2], data[:,3]
good = (flag == 0) & np.isfinite(flux) & np.isfinite(time)
time, flux, flux_err = time[good], flux[good], flux_err[good]
clipped = sigma_clip(flux, sigma=5, maxiters=3)
mask = ~clipped.mask
time, flux, flux_err = time[mask], flux[mask], flux_err[mask]
print(f\"Data: {len(time)} points\")

# ── 2. Remove stellar rotation with Fourier series ──
def fourier_model(t, *params):
    f = params[0]
    offset = params[1]
    n_harmonics = (len(params) - 2) // 2
    result = np.full_like(t, offset)
    for n in range(n_harmonics):
        a = params[2 + 2*n]
        b = params[3 + 2*n]
        result += a * np.cos(2*np.pi*(n+1)*f*t) + b * np.sin(2*np.pi*(n+1)*f*t)
    return result

n_harm = 10
p0 = [1.0/1.4, 1.0] + [0.001, 0.001] * n_harm
popt, pcov = curve_fit(fourier_model, time, flux, p0=p0, maxfev=50000)
rotation_model = fourier_model(time, *popt)
detrended = flux / rotation_model
print(f\"Fourier detrend done, P_rot={1/popt[0]:.4f} d\")

# ── 3. Secondary biweight detrend ──
flat, trend = flatten(time, detrended, window_length=1.0, method='biweight', return_trend=True)
valid = np.isfinite(flat)
t_clean, f_clean, e_clean = time[valid], flat[valid], flux_err[valid]
print(f\"Secondary detrend done: {len(t_clean)} points\")

# ── 4. BLS - moderate grid ──
bls = BoxLeastSquares(t_clean, f_clean, dy=e_clean)

# Search around 5.35 with 10k points (fast)
fine_periods = np.linspace(5.1, 5.6, 10000)
fine_result = bls.power(fine_periods, duration=[0.03, 0.05, 0.08, 0.1, 0.12, 0.15])

power = np.array(fine_result.power)
periods = np.array(fine_result.period)
best_idx = np.argmax(power)
best_period = float(periods[best_idx])
best_duration = float(fine_result.duration[best_idx])
best_t0 = float(fine_result.transit_time[best_idx])
print(f\"Fine BLS: P={best_period:.5f}, dur={best_duration:.4f}, t0={best_t0:.4f}\")

# ── 5. Ultra-fine refinement with smaller grid ──
uf_periods = np.linspace(best_period - 0.01, best_period + 0.01, 20000)
uf_result = bls.power(uf_periods, duration=best_duration)
uf_power = np.array(uf_result.power)
uf_periods_arr = np.array(uf_result.period)
uf_best = np.argmax(uf_power)
final_period = float(uf_periods_arr[uf_best])
final_t0 = float(uf_result.transit_time[uf_best])
print(f\"Ultra-fine: P={final_period:.6f}\")

# ── 6. Write result ──
with open('/root/period.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write(f\"{final_period:.5f}\\n\")
print(f\"\\nWritten {final_period:.5f} to /root/period.txt\")
PYEOF
